name: Super Sunday Lasagna
recipeIngredient: 1 package (10 oz) Frozen chopped spinach, thaw and well drain
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare lasagna according to package directions, then drain in a medium bowl.
2. In a separate bowl, combine ricotta, thawed spinach, 1/2 cup mozzarella, Parmesan, and beaten eggs; mix well.
3. In a 15 x 9 inch baking dish, layer 2 cups pasta sauce, half the lasagna, half the remaining sauce, all of the spinach mixture, half the remaining mozzarella, remaining lasagna, and sauce.
4. Cover with foil and bake in a 350 degree oven for about 45 minutes until bubbly.
5. Remove foil and top with remaining mozzarella and parsley.
6. Bake an additional 15 minutes. Let stand 10 minutes before serving.
7. Refrigerate leftovers.
